description: Nile provides a Postgres-based platform for building multi-tenant applications, including database management, tenant/auth features, and AI-oriented tooling. Its product includes hosted control-plane services plus developer tooling for CLI and MCP-based workflows.
summary: Nile exposes a bearer-authenticated Management HTTP API at `https://global.thenile.dev`, a Node-based `nile` CLI with browser-login or API-key auth, and a self-hosted Nile MCP server package that uses `NILE_API_KEY` and supports SSE at `http://localhost:3000/sse`.
